name: status-feedback
title: Status Feedback
description: An animated success/error badge — a ring strokes on, the checkmark or cross draws after it, and the badge springs in with a matching haptic. Perfect for confirmation overlays.
usage:
let done = StatusFeedbackView()
view.addSubview(done)
done.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
    done.centerXAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerXAnchor),
    done.centerYAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerYAnchor),
])

variants.title: Success
variants.description: Green ring + checkmark, success haptic. The default.
